channel.title: Certificates on SG
channel.description: Recent content in Certificates on SG

item.title: 1st Place, Essay Writing Competition on Arbitration and Policy
item.description: Kautilya Society, NLUO, 2025 — co-authored with Disha Joshi; subsequently published by Vidhi Centre for Legal Policy.

item.title: CS50AI, Harvard University
item.description: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Python, Harvard University (2025).

item.title: Aditya Birla Scholarship, 2025 Shortlist
item.description: Selected among the Top 30 Law Students in India.

item.title: Best Educational Hack, KTByte Hackathon
item.description: International award at the KTByte Hackathon (2025).

item.title: Grade 2 Rock and Pop Guitar with Merit, Trinity College London
item.description: International certification awarded by Trinity College London (2024).
